sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68456" key="monauli/a1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μον-αυλία</orth> (A), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">αὐλός</etym>) <sense id="n68456.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">solo on the flute</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:82" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
